summary: Recording has slightly thin bass but is still deemed usable for the collection; no musical details available.
review: The sole reviewer notes that the audio is a bit light on the low end, particularly the bass, yet they consider it good enough to add to their archive. No comments were made about the performance itself, and the show date remains unknown, so musical quality cannot be assessed.

ai_rating.rationale: Only one brief review mentioning a minor recording flaw (light bass) but also expressing overall acceptance; lack of show information limits assessment.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Bass frequencies are reported as light/under‑represented, no other issues mentioned.
